notes: Guardian shares agility DPS gear; crit-leaning gems feed Savage Defense via Primal Fury. Swap toward stamina for progression. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
